leadText: Prism Armor (Japanese: プリズムアーマー Prism Armor) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. It is one of the signature Abilities of Necrozma.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Prism Armor reduces damage from supereffective moves by 25%, regardless of the effectiveness multiplier. For example, a move that would do 2× damage will do 1.5× damage instead. Unlike Solid Rock and Filter , this Ability cannot be ignored by moves or Abilities . However, like Solid Rock and Filter, this Ability can still be changed or suppressed. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Prism Armor has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Prism Armor reduces damage from supereffective moves by 25%, regardless of the effectiveness multiplier. For example, a move that would do 2× damage will do 1.5× damage instead. Unlike Solid Rock and Filter , this Ability cannot be ignored by moves or Abilities . However, like Solid Rock and Filter, this Ability can still be changed or suppressed.
